Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** **********************************************************

Benedikt Ahrens, Ralph Matthes

SubstitutionSystems

2015


************************************************************)


(** **********************************************************

Contents :

- Construction of a monad from a substitution system
- Proof that morphism of hss gives morphism of monads
- Bundling that into a functor
- Proof that the functor is faithful


************************************************************)

Unset Kernel Term Sharing.

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.

Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.Monads.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorAlgebras.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PointedFunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.HorizontalComposition.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PointedFunctorsComposition.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.BicatOfCatsElementary.

Local Open Scope cat.

Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.Signatures.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.SubstitutionSystems.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.Notation.
Local Open Scope subsys.

Section monad_from_hss.

(** ** Some variables and assumptions *)

Context (C : category).
Context (CP : BinCoproducts C).

Local Notation "'EndC'":= ([C, C]) .
Let CPEndC : BinCoproducts EndC := BinCoproducts_functor_precat _ _ CP.

Context (H : Signature C C C).

Let θ := theta H.

Let θ_strength1_int := Sig_strength_law1 H.
Let θ_strength2_int := Sig_strength_law2 H.

(** The category of pointed endofunctors on [C] *)
Local Notation "'Ptd'" := (category_Ptd C).
(** The category of endofunctors on [C] *)
Local Notation "'EndC'":= ([C, C]) .


(** ** Derivation of the monad laws from a heterogeneous substitution system for signature with strength [H] *)

Section mu_from_fbracket.

(** We assume given a hss [T] *)

Context (T : hss CP H).


Identifier 'p' now a keyword

Local Notation "f ⊕ g" := (BinCoproductOfArrows _ (CPEndC _ _ ) (CPEndC _ _ ) f g).


Definition μ_0 : functor_identity C ⟹ functor_data_from_functor _ _ `T := η T. (*ptd_pt _ (pr1 (pr1 T)).*)

(** [η T] as pointed morphism *)

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
Ptd ⟦ id_Ptd C, p T ⟧


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
Ptd ⟦ id_Ptd C, p T ⟧

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
is_ptd_mor C μ_0

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
ptd_pt C (id_Ptd C) c · μ_0 c = ptd_pt C p T c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
identity c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
 apply id_left.
Defined.

(** the bracket of the "degenerate" argument [η T] *)
Definition μ_1 : functor_composite (U (id_Ptd C)) (`T) ⟹ functor_data_from_functor _ _ `T
  := fbracket _ μ_0_ptd.

(** using uniqueness of bracket for [η T] *)

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
μ_1 = identity `T


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
μ_1 = identity `T

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
identity `T = μ_1

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) (theta H) (id_Ptd C)) T
  μ_0_ptd (identity `T)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
# U μ_0_ptd = η T •• U (id_Ptd C) · identity `T
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) 
  (theta H) (id_Ptd C) `T · 
# H (identity `T) · τ T =
τ T •• U (id_Ptd C) · identity `T

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
# U μ_0_ptd = η T •• U (id_Ptd C) · identity `T
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
∏ x : C,
# U μ_0_ptd x = (η T •• U (id_Ptd C) · identity `T) x

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
x: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) x
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) x =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) x
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) x
· identity (pr1 `(pr1 T) x)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
x: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) x
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) x =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) x
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) x

    apply idpath.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) (theta H) (id_Ptd C) `T
· # H (identity `T) · τ T =
τ T •• U (id_Ptd C) · identity `T
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
∏ x : C,
(nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
   (θ_target H) (theta H) (id_Ptd C) `T
 · # H (identity `T) · τ T) x =
(τ T •• U (id_Ptd C) · identity `T) x

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
(nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
   (θ_target H) (theta H) (id_Ptd C) `T
 · # H (identity `T) · τ T) c =
(τ T •• U (id_Ptd C) · identity `T) c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) (pr2 H) (id_Ptd C)
  `(pr1 T) c · # H (identity `(pr1 T)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
· identity (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) (pr2 H) (id_Ptd C)
  `(pr1 T) c · # H (identity `(pr1 T)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H': θ_Strength1 (pr1 (pr2 H))
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) (pr2 H) (id_Ptd C)
  `(pr1 T) c · # H (identity `(pr1 T)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H': ∏ X : [C, C],
pr1 (pr2 H) (X ⊗ id_Ptd C)
· # (pr1 H) (identity X) =
nat_trans_id (θ_source (pr1 H) (X ⊗ id_Ptd C))
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) (pr2 H) (id_Ptd C)
  `(pr1 T) c · # H (identity `(pr1 T)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H': ∏ X : C ⟶ C,
pr1 (pr2 H) (X ⊗ id_Ptd C)
· # (pr1 H) (identity X) =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_identity_data C) 
     (pr1 H X))
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) (pr2 H) (id_Ptd C)
  `(pr1 T) c · # H (identity `(pr1 T)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H': ∏ X : C ⟶ C,
pr1 (pr2 H) (X ⊗ id_Ptd C)
· # (pr1 H) (identity X) =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_identity_data C) 
     (pr1 H X))
H2: pr1 (pr2 H) (`T ⊗ id_Ptd C)
· # (pr1 H) (identity `T) =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_identity_data C) 
     (pr1 H `T))
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) (pr2 H) (id_Ptd C)
  `(pr1 T) c · # H (identity `(pr1 T)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H': ∏ X : C ⟶ C,
pr1 (pr2 H) (X ⊗ id_Ptd C)
· # (pr1 H) (identity X) =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_identity_data C) 
     (pr1 H X))
H2: pr1 (pr2 H) (`T ⊗ id_Ptd C)
· # (pr1 H) (identity `T) =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_identity_data C) 
     (pr1 H `T))
H3: (pr1 (pr2 H) (`T ⊗ id_Ptd C)
 · # (pr1 H) (identity `T)) c =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_identity_data C) 
     (pr1 H `T)) c
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) (pr2 H) (id_Ptd C)
  `(pr1 T) c · # H (identity `(pr1 T)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H': ∏ X : C ⟶ C,
pr1 (pr2 H) (X ⊗ id_Ptd C)
· # (pr1 H) (identity X) =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_identity_data C) 
     (pr1 H X))
H2: pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ id_Ptd C)
· # (pr1 H) (identity `(pr1 T)) =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_identity_data C) 
     (pr1 H `(pr1 T)))
H3: pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ id_Ptd C) c
· # (pr1 H) (identity `(pr1 T)) c =
identity (pr1 H `(pr1 T) c)
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) (pr2 H) (id_Ptd C)
  `(pr1 T) c · # H (identity `(pr1 T)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H': ∏ X : C ⟶ C,
pr1 (pr2 H) (X ⊗ id_Ptd C)
· # (pr1 H) (identity X) =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_identity_data C) 
     (pr1 H X))
H2: pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ id_Ptd C)
· # (pr1 H) (identity `(pr1 T)) =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_identity_data C) 
     (pr1 H `(pr1 T)))
H3: pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ id_Ptd C) c
· # (pr1 H) (identity `(pr1 T)) c =
identity (pr1 H `(pr1 T) c)
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) (pr2 H) (id_Ptd C)
  `(pr1 T) c · # H (identity `(pr1 T)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
identity (H `T c) · pr1 (τ T) c

H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H

       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]

    (pr1 T) c

H: Signature C C C

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H': ∏ X : C ⟶ C,
pr1 (pr2 H) (X ⊗ id_Ptd C)
· # (pr1 H) (identity X) =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_identity_data C) 
     (pr1 H X))
H2: pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ id_Ptd C)
· # (pr1 H) (identity `(pr1 T)) =

  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_identity_data C) 
     (pr1 H `(pr1 T)))
H3: pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ id_Ptd C) c
· # (pr1 H) (identity `(pr1 T)) c =
identity (pr1 H `(pr1 T) c)
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) (pr2 H) (id_Ptd C)
  `(pr1 T) c · # H (identity `(pr1 T)) c =
identity (H `T c)
 apply H3.
    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H': ∏ X : C ⟶ C,
pr1 (pr2 H) (X ⊗ id_Ptd C)
· # (pr1 H) (identity X) =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_identity_data C) 
     (pr1 H X))
H2: pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ id_Ptd C)
· # (pr1 H) (identity `(pr1 T)) =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_identity_data C) 
     (pr1 H `(pr1 T)))
H3: pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ id_Ptd C) c
· # (pr1 H) (identity `(pr1 T)) c =
identity (pr1 H `(pr1 T) c)
identity (H `T c) · pr1 (τ T) c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
 apply id_left.
Qed.



C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
∏ c : C, μ_1 c = identity ((U (id_Ptd C) ∙ `T) c)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
∏ c : C, μ_1 c = identity ((U (id_Ptd C) ∙ `T) c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
μ_1 c = identity ((U (id_Ptd C) ∙ `T) c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
HA: ∏ x : C, μ_1 x = identity `T x
μ_1 c = identity ((U (id_Ptd C) ∙ `T) c)

  apply HA.
Qed.

(* The whole secret is that this typechecks
  Check (μ_1:U T-->U T).
*)

(* therefore, it is not just the type itself that makes it necessary to introduce μ_1_alt,
   it is rather the question of the formulation of the first strength law of θ *)

(*
Lemma μ_1_identity_stronger : μ_1 = identity (U T).
Proof.
  set (t':=nat_trans_eq_weq C C hs _ _ μ_1 (identity (U T))).
  apply invweq in t'.
  set (t'' := t' μ_1_identity').
  exact t''.
Qed.
*)

(** This is the multiplication of the monad to be constructed *)

Definition μ_2 : functor_composite (`T) (`T) ⟹ pr1 (`T)
  := prejoin_from_hetsubst T.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
μ_2 = fbracket T (identity p T)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
μ_2 = fbracket T (identity p T)

  apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition disp_Monad_data_from_hss : disp_Monad_data `T := μ_2 ,, μ_0.

(** *** Proof of the first monad law *)

(** this directly comes from the contained heterogeneous substitution *)

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
∏ c : C, μ_0 (pr1 `T c) · μ_2 c = identity (pr1 `T c)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
∏ c : C, μ_0 (pr1 `T c) · μ_2 c = identity (pr1 `T c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
μ_0 (pr1 `T c) · μ_2 c = identity (pr1 `T c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
η T (pr1 `T c) · μ_2 c = identity (pr1 `T c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H':= prejoin_from_hetsubst_η T: identity `T = η T •• `T · prejoin_from_hetsubst T
η T (pr1 `T c) · μ_2 c = identity (pr1 `T c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H':= prejoin_from_hetsubst_η T: identity `T = η T •• `T · prejoin_from_hetsubst T
H2:= nat_trans_eq_weq C (identity `T)
  (η T •• `T · prejoin_from_hetsubst T) H': ∏ c : C,
identity `T c =
(η T •• `T · prejoin_from_hetsubst T) c
η T (pr1 `T c) · μ_2 c = identity (pr1 `T c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H':= prejoin_from_hetsubst_η T: identity `T = η T •• `T · prejoin_from_hetsubst T
H2:= nat_trans_eq_weq C (identity `T)
  (η T •• `T · prejoin_from_hetsubst T) H': ∏ c : C,
identity `T c =
(η T •• `T · prejoin_from_hetsubst T) c
identity (pr1 `T c) = η T (pr1 `T c) · μ_2 c

  apply H2.
Qed.

(** *** Proof of the second monad law *)

(** using uniqueness of bracket for [η T] *)

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
∏ c : C,
# (pr1 `T) (μ_0 c) · μ_2 c = identity (pr1 `T c)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
∏ c : C,
# (pr1 `T) (μ_0 c) · μ_2 c = identity (pr1 `T c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
# (pr1 `T) (μ_0 c) · μ_2 c = identity (pr1 `T c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
# (pr1 `T) (μ_0 c) · μ_2 c = μ_1 c
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
μ_1 c = identity (pr1 `T c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
# (pr1 `T) (μ_0 c) · μ_2 c = μ_1 c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
# (pr1 `T) (μ_0 c) · μ_2 c = fbracket T μ_0_ptd c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H': ∏ (Z : Ptd) (f : Ptd ⟦ Z, p T ⟧)
(α : [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧),
bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H) 
     (θ_target H) (theta H) Z) T f α
→ ∏ c : C, pr1 α c = pr1 (fbracket T f) c
# (pr1 `T) (μ_0 c) · μ_2 c = fbracket T μ_0_ptd c

α : [C, C, C] ⟦ U (id_Ptd C) ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T
    ⟧,
bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H) 
     (θ_target H) (theta H) 
     (id_Ptd C)) T μ_0_ptd α
→ ∏ c : C, pr1 α c = pr1 (fbracket T μ_0_ptd) c
# (pr1 `T) (μ_0 c) · μ_2 c = fbracket T μ_0_ptd c

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
# U μ_0_ptd = η T •• U (id_Ptd C) · (`T ∘ μ_0 · μ_2)
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) 
  (theta H) (id_Ptd C) `T · 
# H (`T ∘ μ_0 · μ_2) · τ T =
τ T •• U (id_Ptd C) · (`T ∘ μ_0 · μ_2)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
# U μ_0_ptd = η T •• U (id_Ptd C) · (`T ∘ μ_0 · μ_2)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
∏ x : C,
# U μ_0_ptd x =
(η T •• U (id_Ptd C) · (`T ∘ μ_0 · μ_2)) x

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
# U μ_0_ptd c =
(η T •• U (id_Ptd C) · (`T ∘ μ_0 · μ_2)) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H': ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (functor_identity C) f · η T x' =
η T x · # (`T) f
# U μ_0_ptd c =
(η T •• U (id_Ptd C) · (`T ∘ μ_0 · μ_2)) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H': ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
f
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) x'
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) x') =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) x
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) x · # (`(pr1 T)) f
# U μ_0_ptd c =
(η T •• U (id_Ptd C) · (`T ∘ μ_0 · μ_2)) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H': ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
f
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) x'
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) x') =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) x
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) x · # (`(pr1 T)) f
# U μ_0_ptd c =
(η T •• U (id_Ptd C) · (`T ∘ μ_0) · μ_2) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H': ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
f
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) x'
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) x') =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) x
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) x · # (`(pr1 T)) f
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
· # (pr1 `(pr1 T))
    (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
       (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
     · alg_map
         (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)
· μ_2 c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (`(pr1 T) c)
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
       (`(pr1 T) c)) · μ_2 c

CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H': identity `T = η T •• `T · prejoin_from_hetsubst T
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]

  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (`(pr1 T) c)
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
       (`(pr1 T) c)) · μ_2 c

H': identity `T = η T •• `T · prejoin_from_hetsubst T
H2: ∏ c : C,
identity `T c =
(η T •• `T · prejoin_from_hetsubst T) c
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]

· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (`(pr1 T) c)
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
       (`(pr1 T) c)) · μ_2 c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))

T: hss CP H
c: C
H': identity `T = η T •• `T · prejoin_from_hetsubst T
H2: ∏ c : C,
identity (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T c
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (`(pr1 T) c)
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
       (`(pr1 T) c)) · μ_2 c

CP: BinCoproducts C

H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H': identity `T = η T •• `T · prejoin_from_hetsubst T
H2: ∏ c : C,
identity (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T c
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]

  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map

       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
· identity (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H': identity `T = η T •• `T · prejoin_from_hetsubst T
H2: ∏ c : C,
identity (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T c
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
· identity (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
 apply id_right.
    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) (theta H) (id_Ptd C) `T
· # H (`T ∘ μ_0 · μ_2) · τ T =
τ T •• U (id_Ptd C) · (`T ∘ μ_0 · μ_2)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) (theta H) (id_Ptd C) `T
· (# H (`T ∘ μ_0) · # H μ_2) · τ T =
τ T •• U (id_Ptd C) · (`T ∘ μ_0 · μ_2)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
∏ x : C,
(nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
   (θ_target H) (theta H) (id_Ptd C) `T
 · (# H (`T ∘ μ_0) · # H μ_2) · τ T) x =
(τ T •• U (id_Ptd C) · (`T ∘ μ_0 · μ_2)) x

c: C
(nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)

CP: BinCoproducts C

H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
(nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
   (θ_target H) (theta H) (id_Ptd C) `T
 · (# H (nat_trans_id `T ⋆ μ_0) · # H μ_2) · τ T) c =
(τ T •• U (id_Ptd C) · (nat_trans_id `T ⋆ μ_0 · μ_2))
  c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
(nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
   (θ_target H) (theta H) (id_Ptd C) `T
 · # H (nat_trans_id `T ⋆ μ_0) · # H μ_2 · τ T) c =
(τ T •• U (id_Ptd C) · nat_trans_id `T ⋆ μ_0 · μ_2) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) (pr2 H) (id_Ptd C)
  `(pr1 T) c · # H (nat_trans_id `(pr1 T) ⋆ μ_0) c
· # H μ_2 c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
· horcomp_data C C C (functor_identity C) `(pr1 T)
    `(pr1 T) `(pr1 T) μ_0 (nat_trans_id `(pr1 T)) c
· μ_2 c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) (pr2 H) (id_Ptd C)
  `(pr1 T) c · # H (nat_trans_id `(pr1 T) ⋆ μ_0) c
· # H μ_2 c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
· (identity (`(pr1 T) c)
   · # (`(pr1 T))
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
          (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
        · alg_map
            (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
               (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
               (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                  (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c))
· μ_2 c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) (pr2 H) (id_Ptd C)
  `(pr1 T) c · # H (nat_trans_id `(pr1 T) ⋆ μ_0) c
· # H μ_2 c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
# (pr1 (H `T)) (μ_0 c) · pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ p T)) c
· pr1 (# H μ_2) c · pr1 (τ T) c
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
# (pr1 (H `T)) (μ_0 c) · pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ p T)) c
· pr1 (# H μ_2) c · pr1 (τ T) c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) c
· (identity (`(pr1 T) c)
   · # (`(pr1 T))
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
          (functor_identity C) 
          (H `(pr1 T)) c
        · alg_map
            (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
               [C, C] [C, C]
               (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
               (constant_functor 
                  [C, C, C] 
                  [C, C, C] 
                  (functor_identity C)) H) 
            (pr1 T) c)) · 
μ_2 c

    (nat_trans_id `(pr1 T)
     ⋆ nat_trans_comp
         (coproduct_nat_trans_in1 C C CP
            (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)))

          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)
· pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T))) c · pr1 (# H μ_2) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H': ∏ (X : [C, C]) (Z Z' : Ptd) 
(f : Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧),
identity (H X) ⋆ pr1 f · θ (X ⊗ Z') =
θ (X ⊗ Z) · # H (identity X ⋆ pr1 f)

  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) (pr2 H) (id_Ptd C)
  `(pr1 T) c

    (nat_trans_id `(pr1 T)
     ⋆ nat_trans_comp

            (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)))
         (alg_map

               (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
               (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]

  (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP

· # H (identity `T ⋆ pr1 μ_0_ptd)

 · # H (identity `T ⋆ pr1 μ_0_ptd)) c

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H3: horcomp_data C C C (functor_identity C)
  (pr1 (pr1 T)) (H `(pr1 T)) 
  (H `(pr1 T)) μ_0 (identity (H `(pr1 T))) c
· θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c =
θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ id_Ptd C) c
· # H (identity `(pr1 T) ⋆ μ_0) c
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) (pr2 H) (id_Ptd C)
  `(pr1 T) c
· # H
    (nat_trans_id `(pr1 T)
     ⋆ nat_trans_comp
         (coproduct_nat_trans_in1 C C CP
            (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)))
         (alg_map

CP: BinCoproducts C

H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H3: identity (pr1 (H `(pr1 T)) c)
· # (H `(pr1 T))
    (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
       (functor_identity C) 
       (H `(pr1 T)) c
     · alg_map
         (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
            [C, C] [C, C]
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
            (constant_functor 
               [C, C, C] 
               [C, C, C] 
               (functor_identity C)) H) 
         (pr1 T) c) · θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c =
θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ id_Ptd C) c
· # H (identity `(pr1 T) ⋆ μ_0) c
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) (pr2 H) (id_Ptd C)
  `(pr1 T) c
· # H
    (nat_trans_id `(pr1 T)
     ⋆ nat_trans_comp
         (coproduct_nat_trans_in1 C C CP
            (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)))
         (alg_map
            (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
               (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
               (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                  (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T))) c =
# (pr1 (H `(pr1 T)))
  (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)
· pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T))) c

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H3: # (H `(pr1 T))
  (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) c) · θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c =
θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ id_Ptd C) c
· # H (identity `(pr1 T) ⋆ μ_0) c
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) (pr2 H) (id_Ptd C)
  `(pr1 T) c
· # H
    (nat_trans_id `(pr1 T)
     ⋆ nat_trans_comp
         (coproduct_nat_trans_in1 C C CP
            (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)))
         (alg_map
            (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
               (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
               (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                  (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T))) c =
# (pr1 (H `(pr1 T)))
  (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)
· pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T))) c

        apply (!H3).
      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
# (pr1 (H `T)) (μ_0 c) · pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ p T)) c
· pr1 (# H μ_2) c · pr1 (τ T) c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
· (identity (`(pr1 T) c)
   · # (`(pr1 T))
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
          (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
        · alg_map
            (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
               (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
               (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                  (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c))
· μ_2 c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H': θ_from_hetsubst C CP H T `T
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) · 
τ T = τ T •• `T · prejoin_from_hetsubst T
# (pr1 (H `T)) (μ_0 c) · pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ p T)) c
· pr1 (# H μ_2) c · pr1 (τ T) c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
· (identity (`(pr1 T) c)
   · # (`(pr1 T))
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
          (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
        · alg_map
            (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
               (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
               (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                  (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c))
· μ_2 c

CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H2: (θ_from_hetsubst C CP H T `T
 · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) · 
 τ T) c = (τ T •• `T · prejoin_from_hetsubst T) c
# (pr1 (H `T)) (μ_0 c) · pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ p T)) c
· pr1 (# H μ_2) c · pr1 (τ T) c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
· (identity (`(pr1 T) c)
   · # (`(pr1 T))
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
          (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
        · alg_map
            (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
               (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
               (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                  (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c))
· μ_2 c

    (pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T c
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T))) c · pr1 (# H μ_2) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
pr1 (τ T) (pr1 `T c) · pr1 μ_2 c

            apply H2. (* rewrite done *)
          
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H2: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H) 
  (θ_target H) (pr2 H) p 
  (pr1 T) `(pr1 T) c
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T c
# (pr1 (H `T)) (μ_0 c)
· (pr1 (τ T) (pr1 `T c) · pr1 μ_2 c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
· (identity (`(pr1 T) c)
   · # (`(pr1 T))
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
          (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
        · alg_map
            (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
               (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
               (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                  (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c))
· μ_2 c

· μ_2 c

CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))

c: C
# (pr1 (H `T)) (μ_0 c) · pr1 (τ T) (pr1 `T c) = ?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
?b =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) c · identity (`(pr1 T) c)
· # (`(pr1 T))
    (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
       (functor_identity C) 
       (H `(pr1 T)) c
     · alg_map
         (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
            [C, C] [C, C]

               [C, C, C]

         (pr1 T) c)

CP: BinCoproducts C

H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
# (pr1 (H `T)) (μ_0 c) · pr1 (τ T) (pr1 `T c) = ?b
 apply (nat_trans_ax (τ T) ). 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
τ T (functor_identity C c) · # (`T) (μ_0 c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
· identity (`(pr1 T) c)
· # (`(pr1 T))
    (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
       (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
     · alg_map
         (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)

CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
τ T (functor_identity C c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
· identity (`(pr1 T) c)

            
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
· identity (`(pr1 T) c) = τ T (functor_identity C c)

            apply id_right.
        }
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
μ_1 c = identity (pr1 `T c)
 apply μ_1_identity'.
Qed.

(** [T_squared] is [T∙T, η∙η], that is, the selfcomposition of [T] as a pointed functor *)

Definition T_squared : Ptd := ptd_compose _ (p T) (p T).

(** [μ_2] is not just a natural transformation from [T∙T] to [T], but also compatible with
    the pointed structure given by [η] *)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
∏ c : C, ptd_pt C T_squared c · μ_2 c = pr1 (η T) c


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
∏ c : C, ptd_pt C T_squared c · μ_2 c = pr1 (η T) c

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))

c: C
ptd_pt C T_squared c · μ_2 c = pr1 (η T) c

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
ptd_pt C T_squared c · prejoin_from_hetsubst T c =
pr1 (η T) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
ptd_pt C (p T p• p T) c · prejoin_from_hetsubst T c =
pr1 (η T) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
ptd_pt C
  (functor_compose (pr1 p T) (pr1 p T),,
   # (functorial_composition C C C)
     (ptd_pt C p T,, ptd_pt C p T)) c
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T c = pr1 (η T) c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
ptd_pt C
  (functor_compose (pr1 p T) (pr1 p T),,
   # (pre_comp_functor
        (pr1 (functor_identity C,, functor_identity C)))
     (ptd_pt C p T)
   · # (post_comp_functor (pr2 (pr1 p T,, pr1 p T)))
       (ptd_pt C p T)) c · prejoin_from_hetsubst T c =
pr1 (η T) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
· # (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))
    (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
       (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
     · alg_map
         (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H': # (pr1 `T) (μ_0 c) · μ_2 c = identity (pr1 `T c)
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
· # (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))
    (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
       (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
     · alg_map
         (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))

c: C
H': # (pr1 `(pr1 T))
  (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c =
identity (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
· # (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))
    (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
       (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
     · alg_map
         (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H': # (pr1 `(pr1 T))
  (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c =
identity (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
· # (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))
    (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
       (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
     · alg_map
         (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T c =
pr1 (η T) c · identity (`T c)

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))

          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]

       (pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c =

· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors

       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) c

H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H': # (pr1 `(pr1 T))
  (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c =
identity (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· (alg_map
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
   · (# (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))
        (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
           (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
         · alg_map
             (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
                (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                   (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)
      · prejoin_from_hetsubst T c)) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· (alg_map
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
   · identity (`(pr1 T) c))

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))

  (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors

             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c =
identity (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
alg_map
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
     (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
        (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
· (# (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP

      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T c) =
alg_map
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)

H: Signature C C C
