θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H': # (pr1 `(pr1 T))
  (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c =
identity (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
# (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))
  (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T c = identity (`(pr1 T) c)

    exact H'.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H': # (pr1 `(pr1 T))
  (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c =
identity (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
pr1 (η T) c · identity (`T c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
 apply id_right.
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C

H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
Ptd ⟦ T_squared, p T ⟧

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
is_ptd_mor C μ_2

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
∏ c : C, ptd_pt C T_squared c · μ_2 c = ptd_pt C p T c

  apply μ_2_is_ptd_mor.
Defined.

Definition μ_3 : EndC ⟦ U T_squared • `T,  `T⟧ := fbracket T μ_2_ptd.


(** *** Proof of the third monad law via transitivity *)
(** We show that both sides are equal to [μ_3 = fbracket μ_2] *)

(** using uniqueness of bracket for the prejoin *)

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
μ_3 =
(`T ∘ μ_2
 :
 [C, C] ⟦ (`T ∙ `T) ∙ `T : [C, C, C],
 `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C] ⟧) · μ_2


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
μ_3 =
(`T ∘ μ_2
 :
 [C, C] ⟦ (`T ∙ `T) ∙ `T : [C, C, C],
 `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C] ⟧) · μ_2

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
`T ∘ μ_2 · μ_2 = μ_3

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) (theta H) T_squared) T
  μ_2_ptd (`T ∘ μ_2 · μ_2)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
# U μ_2_ptd = η T •• U T_squared · (`T ∘ μ_2 · μ_2)
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) 
  (theta H) T_squared `T · 
# H (`T ∘ μ_2 · μ_2) · τ T =
τ T •• U T_squared · (`T ∘ μ_2 · μ_2)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C

H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
# U μ_2_ptd = η T •• U T_squared · (`T ∘ μ_2 · μ_2)
 
C: category

∏ x : C,
# U μ_2_ptd x =
(η T •• U T_squared · (`T ∘ μ_2 · μ_2)) x

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H2: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
f
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) x'
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) x') =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) x
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) x · # (`(pr1 T)) f
# U μ_2_ptd c =
(η T •• U T_squared · (`T ∘ μ_2 · μ_2)) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H2: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
f
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) x'
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) x') =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) x
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) x · # (`(pr1 T)) f
# U μ_2_ptd c =
(η T •• U T_squared · (`T ∘ μ_2) · μ_2) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
μ_2 c =
pr1 μ_2 c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
     (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
       (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)) · μ_2 c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
μ_2 c = μ_2 c · identity (pr1 `T c)

T: hss CP H
c: C
μ_2 c · identity (pr1 `T c) =
pr1 μ_2 c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)) · 
μ_2 c

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))

c: C
μ_2 c = μ_2 c · identity (pr1 `T c)

    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]

  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c = identity (pr1 `T c)

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) (theta H) T_squared `T
· # H (`T ∘ μ_2 · μ_2) · τ T =
τ T •• U T_squared · (`T ∘ μ_2 · μ_2)

H3: ∏ (A B C : category) (X X' : [A, B])
(α : [A, B] ⟦ X, X' ⟧) (Z : [B, C]),
nat_trans_id Z ⋆ α = Z ∘ α
identity `(pr1 T) ⋆ μ_2 = `T ∘ μ_2

H4: nat_trans_id `T ⋆ μ_2 = `T ∘ μ_2
identity `(pr1 T) ⋆ μ_2 = `T ∘ μ_2

      apply H4.

H1: identity (H `(pr1 T)) ⋆ μ_2
· θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) =
θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ T_squared)
· # H (identity `(pr1 T) ⋆ μ_2)

T: hss CP H
∏ x : C,
(identity (H `(pr1 T)) ⋆ μ_2
 · θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) · # H μ_2 · τ T) x =
(τ T •• U T_squared · (`T ∘ μ_2) · μ_2) x

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
horcomp_data C C C
  (functor_compose (pr1 (pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 T)))
  (pr1 (pr1 T)) (H `(pr1 T)) (H `(pr1 T)) μ_2
  (identity (H `(pr1 T))) c
· θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c · # H μ_2 c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· # (pr1 `(pr1 T)) (pr1 μ_2 c) · μ_2 c

CP: BinCoproducts C

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
identity
  (pr1 (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c)))
· # (H `(pr1 T)) (μ_2 c) · θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· # H μ_2 c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· # (pr1 `(pr1 T)) (pr1 μ_2 c) · μ_2 c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
# (H `(pr1 T)) (μ_2 c) · θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· # H μ_2 c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· # (pr1 `(pr1 T)) (pr1 μ_2 c) · μ_2 c

       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T c
θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· (# H μ_2 c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)) =
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) (pr2 H) p (pr1 T) `(pr1 T)
  c · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)

        apply assoc.
      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H3: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H) 
  (θ_target H) (pr2 H) p 
  (pr1 T) `(pr1 T) c
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T c
# (H `(pr1 T)) (μ_2 c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
     (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
       (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) · prejoin_from_hetsubst T c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· # (pr1 `(pr1 T)) (pr1 μ_2 c) · μ_2 c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
# (H `(pr1 T)) (μ_2 c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
     (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
       (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) · prejoin_from_hetsubst T c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· # (pr1 `(pr1 T)) (pr1 μ_2 c) · μ_2 c

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
# (H `(pr1 T)) (μ_2 c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
    (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) · prejoin_from_hetsubst T c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· # (pr1 `(pr1 T)) (pr1 μ_2 c) · μ_2 c

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
# (H `(pr1 T)) (μ_2 c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
    (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· # (pr1 `(pr1 T)) (pr1 μ_2 c)

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H1: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H `T) f · τ T x' = τ T x · # (`T) f
# (H `(pr1 T)) (μ_2 c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
    (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· # (pr1 `(pr1 T)) (pr1 μ_2 c)

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H1: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H `T) f
· tau2_from_alg
    (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
    (constant_functor [C, C] 
       [C, C] (functor_identity C)) H T x' =
tau2_from_alg
  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
  (constant_functor [C, C] 
     [C, C] (functor_identity C)) H T x
· # (`T) f
# (H `(pr1 T)) (μ_2 c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
    (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· # (pr1 `(pr1 T)) (pr1 μ_2 c)

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
# (H `(pr1 T)) (μ_2 c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
    (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) =
# (H `T) (pr1 μ_2 c)
· tau2_from_alg (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
    (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
       (functor_identity C)) H T (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)

        apply assoc'.
Qed.

Local Notation "'T•T²'" := (functor_compose (functor_composite (`T) (`T)) (`T) : [C, C]).


Local Notation "'T²∙T'" := (@functor_composite C C C
                    (@functor_composite C C C (`T)
                                              (` T))
                    (` T) : functor C C).

(** using uniqueness of bracket for the prejoin also here *)

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
(μ_2 •• `T · μ_2
 :
 [C, C] ⟦ functor_compose (`T ∙ `T) `T : [C, C], `T ⟧) =
μ_3


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
(μ_2 •• `T · μ_2
 :
 [C, C] ⟦ functor_compose (`T ∙ `T) `T : [C, C], `T ⟧) =
μ_3

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) (theta H) T_squared) T
  μ_2_ptd (μ_2 •• `T · μ_2)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
# U μ_2_ptd = η T •• U T_squared · (μ_2 •• `T · μ_2)
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) 
  (theta H) T_squared `T · 
# H (μ_2 •• `T · μ_2) · 
τ T = τ T •• U T_squared · (μ_2 •• `T · μ_2)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
# U μ_2_ptd = η T •• U T_squared · (μ_2 •• `T · μ_2)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
# U μ_2_ptd c =
(η T •• U T_squared · (μ_2 •• `T · μ_2)) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
μ_2 c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· (pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
μ_2 c = identity ((`T ∙ `T) c) · μ_2 c

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))

c: C
identity ((`T ∙ `T) c) · μ_2 c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· (pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C

H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
μ_2 c = identity ((`T ∙ `T) c) · μ_2 c
 apply pathsinv0, id_left.

  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H1: μ_0 (pr1 `T (pr1 `T c)) · μ_2 (pr1 `T c) =
identity (pr1 `T (pr1 `T c))
identity ((`T ∙ `T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)

      apply (!H1).
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) (theta H) T_squared `T
· # H (μ_2 •• `T · μ_2) · τ T =
τ T •• U T_squared · (μ_2 •• `T · μ_2)

:

pre_composition_functor_data C C C `T `T ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ functor_compose (`T ∙ `T) `T : [C, C],
pre_composition_functor_data C C C `T `T ⟧
c: C
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) (pr2 H) T_squared `(pr1 T)
  c · (# H F c · # H μ_2 c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· (pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c)

:

Ac:= nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H) 
  (θ_target H) (pr2 H) T_squared `
  (pr1 T) c: C
⟦ functor_composite_data
    (functor_composite_data 
       (pr1 (pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 T))) 
    (H `(pr1 T)) c,
functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
  (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] 
  (θ_target H) T_squared `
  (pr1 T) c ⟧
Ac · (# H F c · # H μ_2 c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· (pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c)

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
B:= τ (pr1 T): H `(pr1 T) ⟹ `(pr1 T)
F:= pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C `(pr1 T) μ_2: functor_composite_data
  (functor_composite_data `(pr1 T) `(pr1 T))
  `(pr1 T)
⟹ functor_composite_data `(pr1 T) `(pr1 T)
c: C
Ac:= nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H) 
  (θ_target H) (pr2 H) T_squared `
  (pr1 T) c: C ⟦ H `(pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c)),
functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
  (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] 
  (θ_target H) T_squared `
  (pr1 T) c ⟧
Ac · (# H F c · # H μ_2 c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· (pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
B:= τ (pr1 T): H `(pr1 T) ⟹ `(pr1 T)
F:= pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C `(pr1 T) μ_2: functor_composite_data
  (functor_composite_data `(pr1 T) `(pr1 T))
  `(pr1 T)
⟹ functor_composite_data `(pr1 T) `(pr1 T)
c: C
Ac:= nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H) 
  (θ_target H) (pr2 H) T_squared `
  (pr1 T) c: C ⟦ H `(pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c)),
functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
  (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] 
  (θ_target H) T_squared `
  (pr1 T) c ⟧
Ac · (# H F c · # H μ_2 c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· (pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c)

HX: ∏ Z : Ptd,
# H μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (U Z)) · θ (`T ⊗ Z) =

· # H (μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (U Z)))

· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP

   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)

  (pr1 T) c ⟧

  (pr1 (pr1 T)) (H (`(pr1 T) ∙ `(pr1 T)))
  (H `(pr1 T))
  (nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))) 
  (# H μ_2) c · θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c =
θ (`(pr1 T) ∙ `(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· # H (μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))) c
Ac · (# H F c · # H μ_2 c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]

· θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c =

· # H (μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))) c
Ac · (# H F c · # H μ_2 c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]

  (pr1 T) c: C ⟦ H `(pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c)),

  (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] 
  (θ_target H) T_squared `
  (pr1 T) c ⟧
HXX: # H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
· θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c =
θ (`(pr1 T) ∙ `(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· # H (μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))) c
Ac · (# H F c · # H μ_2 c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ p T)) (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· # H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c) · θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· # H μ_2 c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
B:= τ (pr1 T): H `(pr1 T) ⟹ `(pr1 T)
F:= pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C `(pr1 T) μ_2: functor_composite_data
  (functor_composite_data `(pr1 T) `(pr1 T))
  `(pr1 T)
⟹ functor_composite_data `(pr1 T) `(pr1 T)
c: C
Ac:= nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H) 
  (θ_target H) (pr2 H) T_squared `
  (pr1 T) c: C ⟦ H `(pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c)),
functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
  (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] 
  (θ_target H) T_squared `
  (pr1 T) c ⟧
HXX: # H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
· θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c =
θ (`(pr1 T) ∙ `(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· # H (μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))) c
pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ p T)) (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· # H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c) · 
θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c · 
# H μ_2 c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· (pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c)

   · θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c)

?t1 =
# H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c) · θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
 apply (!HXX).

  (functor_composite_data `(pr1 T) `(pr1 T))
  `(pr1 T)
⟹ functor_composite_data `(pr1 T) `(pr1 T)

∏
α : [C, C] ⟦ functor_compose (`T ∙ `T) `T, `T ∙ `T ⟧,
pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ T_squared)) c · pr1 (# H α) c =

· pr1 (θ (`T ∙ `T ⊗ p T)) c · pr1 (# H α) c

α : [C, C]

    `T ∙ `T ⟧,
pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ T_squared)) c
· pr1 (# H α) c =

· pr1
    (θ
       (((`T ∙ `T : [C, C, C]) : [C, C])
        ⊗ p T)) c
· pr1
    (# H
       (α
        :
        [C, C]
        ⟦ functor_compose `T (`T ∙ `T),
        `T ∙ `T ⟧)) c
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H) 
  (θ_target H) (pr2 H) T_squared `
  (pr1 T) c · # H F c =

· (θ (`(pr1 T) ∙ `(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
   · # H (μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))) c)

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
B:= τ (pr1 T): H `(pr1 T) ⟹ `(pr1 T)
F:= pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C `(pr1 T) μ_2: functor_composite_data
  (functor_composite_data `(pr1 T) `(pr1 T))
  `(pr1 T)
⟹ functor_composite_data `(pr1 T) `(pr1 T)
c: C
Ac:= nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H) 
  (θ_target H) (pr2 H) T_squared `
  (pr1 T) c: C ⟦ H `(pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c)),
functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
  (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] 
  (θ_target H) T_squared `
  (pr1 T) c ⟧
HXX: # H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
· θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c =
θ (`(pr1 T) ∙ `(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· # H (μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))) c
pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ p T)) (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· # H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c) · θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· # H μ_2 c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· (pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))

  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)

· (pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c)

             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ p T)) (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· # H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
     (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
       (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) · prejoin_from_hetsubst T c)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H5: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H) 
  (θ_target H) (pr2 H) p 
  (pr1 T) `(pr1 T) c
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T c
pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ p T)) (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· (# H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
   · (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
      · (# H μ_2 c
         · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
              (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
            · alg_map
                (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C]
                   [C, C]
                   (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C
                      CP)
                   (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] (functor_identity C))
                   H) (pr1 T) c)))) =
pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ p T)) (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· (# H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
        (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
      · (alg_map
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
           (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
         · prejoin_from_hetsubst T c)))

θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· (# H μ_2 c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
      · alg_map

· (alg_map

        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)

        (functor_identity C)

      · alg_map

                [C, C, C]

                (functor_identity C)) H)

coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· (alg_map
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
        [C, C] [C, C]
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
        (constant_functor 
           [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (functor_identity C)) H) 
     (pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T c)
θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· (# H μ_2 c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)

  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· (alg_map

        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
     (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) · prejoin_from_hetsubst T c)
 apply H5.

CP: BinCoproducts C

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
HT: θ_from_hetsubst C CP H T `T
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) · 
τ T = τ T •• `T · prejoin_from_hetsubst T
pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ p T)) (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· # H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
    (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) =

  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)

          
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H6: ∏ x : C,
(θ_from_hetsubst C CP H T `T
 · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) · 
 τ T) x = (τ T •• `T · prejoin_from_hetsubst T) x
pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ p T)) (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· # H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
    (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)

          
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H6: ∏ x : C,
(θ_from_hetsubst C CP H T `T
 · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) · 
 τ T) x = (τ T •• `T · prejoin_from_hetsubst T) x
pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ p T)) (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· # H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 `(pr1 T) c))
       (H `(pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (functor_identity C (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c)))
     (H `(pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)

          
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H6: ∏ x : C,
(θ_from_hetsubst C CP H T `T
 · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T)
 · (BinCoproductIn2
      (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
         (constant_functor 
            [C, C] [C, C] 
            (functor_identity C) `T) 
         (H `T))
    · alg_map
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
           [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
           (constant_functor 
              [C, C] [C, C] 
              (functor_identity C)) H) T)) x =
((BinCoproductIn2
    (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C] [C, C] 
          (functor_identity C) `T) 
       (H `T))
  · alg_map
      (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
         [C, C] [C, C]
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
         (constant_functor 
            [C, C] [C, C] 
            (functor_identity C)) H) T) •• `T
 · prejoin_from_hetsubst T) x
pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ p T)) (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· # H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 `(pr1 T) c))
       (H `(pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (functor_identity C (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c)))
     (H `(pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)

          
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= pr2 H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H6: ∏ x : C,
(θ_from_hetsubst C CP H T `T
 · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T)
 · BinCoproductIn2
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
        (constant_functor 
           [C, C] [C, C] 
           (functor_identity C) `T) 
        (H `T))
 · alg_map
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
        [C, C] [C, C]
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
        (constant_functor 
           [C, C] [C, C] 
           (functor_identity C)) H) T) x =
((BinCoproductIn2
    (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C] [C, C] 
          (functor_identity C) `T) 
       (H `T))
  · alg_map
      (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
         [C, C] [C, C]
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
         (constant_functor 
            [C, C] [C, C] 
            (functor_identity C)) H) T) •• `T
 · prejoin_from_hetsubst T) x
pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ p T)) (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· # H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 `(pr1 T) c))
       (H `(pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (functor_identity C (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c)))
     (H `(pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)

          apply H6.
      }
Qed.

(** proving a variant of the third monad law with assoc iso explicitly inserted *)

Section third_monad_law_with_assoc.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
(`T ∘ μ_2
 :
 [C, C] ⟦ (`T ∙ `T) ∙ `T, `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C] ⟧) · μ_2 =
rassociator_CAT `T `T `T · μ_2 •• `T · μ_2

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
(`T ∘ μ_2
 :
 [C, C] ⟦ (`T ∙ `T) ∙ `T, `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C] ⟧) · μ_2 =
rassociator_CAT `T `T `T · μ_2 •• `T · μ_2

H: Signature C C C

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
μ_3 = rassociator_CAT `T `T `T · μ_2 •• `T · μ_2

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
rassociator_CAT `T `T `T · μ_2 •• `T · μ_2 = μ_3

  (** we only aim at a proof alternative to [μ_3_μ_2_T_μ_2] *)
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C

θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) (theta H) T_squared) T
  μ_2_ptd (rassociator_CAT `T `T `T · μ_2 •• `T · μ_2)

H: Signature C C C

T: hss CP H
# U μ_2_ptd =
η T •• U T_squared
· (rassociator_CAT `T `T `T · μ_2 •• `T · μ_2)

nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) 
  (theta H) T_squared `T
· # H (rassociator_CAT `T `T `T · μ_2 •• `T · μ_2)
· τ T =
τ T •• U T_squared
· (rassociator_CAT `T `T `T · μ_2 •• `T · μ_2)

c: C
# U μ_2_ptd c =
(η T •• U T_squared
 · (rassociator_CAT `T `T `T · μ_2 •• `T · μ_2)) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
μ_2 c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· (identity (`(pr1 T) (`(pr1 T) (`(pr1 T) c)))
   · pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c)

H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))

c: C
μ_2 c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· (identity (`(pr1 T) (`(pr1 T) (`(pr1 T) c)))
   · pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)) · μ_2 c

c: C
μ_2 c = identity ((`T ∙ `T) c) · μ_2 c

  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors

    (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· (identity (`(pr1 T) (`(pr1 T) (`(pr1 T) c)))
   · pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)) · 
μ_2 c

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))

c: C
μ_2 c = identity ((`T ∙ `T) c) · μ_2 c
 apply pathsinv0, id_left.

  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))

  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)

    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· (identity (`(pr1 T) (`(pr1 T) (`(pr1 T) c)))
   · pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
identity ((`T ∙ `T) c) =

  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H1: μ_0 (pr1 `T (pr1 `T c)) · μ_2 (pr1 `T c) =
identity (pr1 `T (pr1 `T c))
identity ((`T ∙ `T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H1: coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 `(pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c))
· μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) =
identity (pr1 `(pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c))
identity ((`T ∙ `T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)

      apply (!H1).
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) (theta H) T_squared `T
· # H (rassociator_CAT `T `T `T · μ_2 •• `T · μ_2)
· τ T =
τ T •• U T_squared
· (rassociator_CAT `T `T `T · μ_2 •• `T · μ_2)

CP: BinCoproducts C

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) (theta H) T_squared `T
· (# H (rassociator_CAT `T `T `T) · # H (μ_2 •• `T)
   · # H μ_2) · τ T =
τ T •• U T_squared
· (rassociator_CAT `T `T `T · μ_2 •• `T · μ_2)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C

H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) (theta H) T_squared `T
· # H (rassociator_CAT `T `T `T) · # H (μ_2 •• `T)
· # H μ_2 · τ T =
τ T •• U T_squared · rassociator_CAT `T `T `T
· μ_2 •• `T · μ_2

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) (theta H) (p T p• p T) `T
· # H (rassociator_CAT `T `T `T) · # H (μ_2 •• `T)
· # H μ_2 · τ T =
τ T •• U (p T p• p T) · rassociator_CAT `T `T `T
· μ_2 •• `T · μ_2

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
∏ x : C,
(nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
   (θ_target H) (theta H) (p T p• p T) `T
 · # H (rassociator_CAT `T `T `T) · # H (μ_2 •• `T)
 · # H μ_2 · τ T) x =
(τ T •• U (p T p• p T) · rassociator_CAT `T `T `T
 · μ_2 •• `T · μ_2) x

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) (pr2 H)
  (p (pr1 T) p• p (pr1 T)) `(pr1 T) c
· # H (rassociator_CAT `(pr1 T) `(pr1 T) `(pr1 T)) c
· # H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C `(pr1 T) μ_2) c
· # H μ_2 c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· identity (`(pr1 T) (`(pr1 T) (`(pr1 T) c)))
· pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c

  c

       (pr1 (pr1 T)) `(pr1 T)) c =
identity
  (pr1 H `(pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c)))
· pr1 (pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)))

· pr1 (pr2 H)
    (functor_compose (pr1 (pr1 T)) `(pr1 T)

identity
  (pr1 H `(pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c)))
· pr1 (pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)))
    (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)

· pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) · 
μ_2 c

          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· identity (`(pr1 T) (`(pr1 T) (`(pr1 T) c)))
· pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
pr1 (pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)))
  (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· pr1 (pr2 H)
    (functor_compose (pr1 (pr1 T)) `(pr1 T)
     ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· # H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C `(pr1 T) μ_2) c
· # H μ_2 c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· identity (`(pr1 T) (`(pr1 T) (`(pr1 T) c)))
· pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C

H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
HX: ∏ Z : Ptd,
# H μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (U Z)) · θ (`T ⊗ Z) =
θ (`T ∙ `T ⊗ Z)
· # H (μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (U Z)))
pr1 (pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)))
  (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· pr1 (pr2 H)
    (functor_compose (pr1 (pr1 T)) `(pr1 T)
     ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· # H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C `(pr1 T) μ_2) c
· # H μ_2 c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c

c: C
HX1: # H μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (U p T))
· θ (`T ⊗ p T) =

· # H (μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (U p T)))
pr1 (pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)))

· alg_map

  (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))

c: C

 · θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T))) c =
(θ (`(pr1 T) ∙ `(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T))
 · # H (μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))))
  c
pr1 (pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)))
  (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· pr1 (pr2 H)
    (functor_compose (pr1 (pr1 T)) `(pr1 T)
     ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c

· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]

          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]

  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
HXX: horcomp_data C C C (pr1 (pr1 T)) 
  (pr1 (pr1 T)) (H (`(pr1 T) ∙ `(pr1 T)))
  (H `(pr1 T))
  (nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))) 
  (# H μ_2) c · θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c =
θ (`(pr1 T) ∙ `(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· # H (μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))) c
pr1 (pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)))
  (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· pr1 (pr2 H)
    (functor_compose (pr1 (pr1 T)) `(pr1 T)
     ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· # H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C `(pr1 T) μ_2) c
· # H μ_2 c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c

H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
HXX: # H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
· # (H `(pr1 T))
    (identity (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c))
· θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c =
θ (`(pr1 T) ∙ `(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· # H (μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))) c
pr1 (pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)))
  (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· pr1 (pr2 H)
    (functor_compose (pr1 (pr1 T)) `(pr1 T)
     ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· # H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C `(pr1 T) μ_2) c
· # H μ_2 c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)

· pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c

· # (H `(pr1 T))

  (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· (# H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
   · # (H `(pr1 T)) (identity (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c))

H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
HXX: # H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
· # (H `(pr1 T))
    (identity (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c))
· θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c =
θ (`(pr1 T) ∙ `(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· # H (μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))) c
pr1 (pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)))
  (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· (# H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
   · # (H `(pr1 T)) (identity (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c))
   · θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c) · 
# H μ_2 c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) · 
μ_2 c

H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
HXX: # H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
· # (H `(pr1 T))
    (identity (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c))
· θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c =
θ (`(pr1 T) ∙ `(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· # H (μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))) c
pr1 (pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)))
  (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· pr1 (pr2 H)
    (functor_compose (pr1 (pr1 T)) `(pr1 T)
     ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· # H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C `(pr1 T) μ_2) c =
pr1 (pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)))
  (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· (# H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
   · # (H `(pr1 T)) (identity (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c))
   · θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c)

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
HXX: # H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
· # (H `(pr1 T))
    (identity (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c))
· θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c =
θ (`(pr1 T) ∙ `(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· # H (μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))) c
pr1 (pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)))
  (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· (pr1 (pr2 H)
     (functor_compose (pr1 (pr1 T)) `(pr1 T)
      ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
   · # H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C `(pr1 T) μ_2) c) =
pr1 (pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)))
  (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· (# H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
   · (# (H `(pr1 T)) (identity (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c))
      · θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c))

T: hss CP H
c: C
∏ x : C,
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C `(pr1 T) μ_2 x =
(μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))) x

(μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))) x
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]

θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c, x: C
pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) x) =
horcomp_data C C C (pr1 (pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 T))
  (`(pr1 T) ∙ `(pr1 T)) `(pr1 T)
  (nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))) μ_2 x
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c, x: C
pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) x) =
μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) x)
· # (`(pr1 T)) (identity (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) x))
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c, x: C
pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) x) =
μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) x)
· identity (`(pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) x))
 apply pathsinv0, id_right.

# H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C `(pr1 T) μ_2) =

pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C `(pr1 T) μ_2 =

 apply TTTT.
             
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C

# H (μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T))))
# H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C `(pr1 T) μ_2) c =
# H (μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))) c

             apply (nat_trans_eq_pointwise TTT).
          
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C

H: Signature C C C

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
HXX: # H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
· # (H `(pr1 T))
    (identity (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c))
· θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c =
θ (`(pr1 T) ∙ `(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· # H (μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))) c
θ (`(pr1 T) ∙ `(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· # H (μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))) c =
# H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
· (# (H `(pr1 T)) (identity (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c))
   · θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c)

T: hss CP H
c: C
HXX: # H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
· # (H `(pr1 T))
    (identity (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c))
· θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c =
θ (`(pr1 T) ∙ `(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· # H (μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))) c

· # H (μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))) c =

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
HXX: # H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
· # (H `(pr1 T))
    (identity (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c))
· θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c =
θ (`(pr1 T) ∙ `(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· # H (μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))) c
θ (`(pr1 T) ∙ `(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· # H (μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))) c =
# H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
· # (H `(pr1 T)) (identity (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c))
· θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c

            apply (!HXX).
         }
      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
HXX: # H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
· # (H `(pr1 T))
    (identity (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c))
· θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c =
θ (`(pr1 T) ∙ `(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· # H (μ_2 ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)))) c
pr1 (pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)))
  (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· (# H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
   · # (H `(pr1 T)) (identity (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c))
   · θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c) · # H μ_2 c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
pr1 (pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)))
  (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· (# H μ_2 (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
   · # (H `(pr1 T)) (identity (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c))
   · θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c) · # H μ_2 c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· pr1 μ_2 (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c

 · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) ·

  (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)

   · (# (H `(pr1 T)) (identity (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c))
      · (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
         · (# H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) c

        (functor_identity C)

  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))

        (constant_functor 
           [C, C, C] [C, C, C]

   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T c)

  (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· (# H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
   · (# (H `(pr1 T)) (identity (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c))

   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP

c: C
H5: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H) 
  (θ_target H) (pr2 H) p 
  (pr1 T) `(pr1 T) c
· (# H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) 
        (H `(pr1 T)) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
             [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
             (constant_functor 
                [C, C, C] 
                [C, C, C] 
                (functor_identity C)) H)

  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))

     (pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T c)
?b =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· (alg_map
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
        [C, C] [C, C]

        (constant_functor

   · (pr1 (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
      · prejoin_from_hetsubst T c))

  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)

        (functor_identity C)

pr1 (pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)))
  (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· (# H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
   · (# (H `(pr1 T)) (identity (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c))

                 (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
