θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H5: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H) 
  (θ_target H) (pr2 H) p 
  (pr1 T) `(pr1 T) c
· (# H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) 
        (H `(pr1 T)) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
             [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
             (constant_functor 
                [C, C, C] 
                [C, C, C] 
                (functor_identity C)) H) 
          (pr1 T) c)) =

  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))

· (alg_map
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
        [C, C] [C, C]
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
        (constant_functor 
           [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (functor_identity C)) H) 
     (pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T c)
θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)) c
· (# H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)) =
?t2
 apply H5.

  (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· (# H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
   · (# (H `(pr1 T)) (identity (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c))
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
           (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
           (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
         · (alg_map
              (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
                 (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
                 (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                    (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
              (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
            · prejoin_from_hetsubst T c)))) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· (alg_map
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
     (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
   · (pr1 (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
      · prejoin_from_hetsubst T c))

c: C
H6: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H) 
  (θ_target H) (pr2 H) p 
  (pr1 T) `(pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H)

  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))

· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
pr1 (pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)))
  (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
    (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· alg_map

· pr1 (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)

θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

c: C
H6: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H) 
  (θ_target H) (pr2 H) p 
  (pr1 T) `(pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 `(pr1 T) c))
        (H `(pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)))
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (functor_identity C
        (pr1 `(pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)))
     (H `(pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c))))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
pr1 (pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)))
  (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
    (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· pr1 (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)

    (pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (pr1 `(pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c))
     (H `(pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c))))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c))
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
pr1 (pr1 (pr2 H) (`(pr1 T) ⊗ p (pr1 T)))
  (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
    (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 `(pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 T) c))
· pr1 (prejoin_from_hetsubst T) (pr1 `(pr1 T) c)

        apply H6.
Qed.

End third_monad_law_with_assoc.

(*
Unset Printing All.
Set Printing Notations.
Unset Printing Implicit.
 *)

(** Finally putting together all the preparatory results to obtain a monad *)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
disp_Monad_laws disp_Monad_data_from_hss


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
disp_Monad_laws disp_Monad_data_from_hss

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
(∏ c : C,
 disp_η disp_Monad_data_from_hss (`T c)
 · disp_μ disp_Monad_data_from_hss c = identity (`T c))
× (∏ c : C,
   # (`T) (disp_η disp_Monad_data_from_hss c)
   · disp_μ disp_Monad_data_from_hss c =
   identity (`T c))
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
∏ c : C,
# (`T) (disp_μ disp_Monad_data_from_hss c)
· disp_μ disp_Monad_data_from_hss c =
disp_μ disp_Monad_data_from_hss (`T c)
· disp_μ disp_Monad_data_from_hss c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
(∏ c : C,
 disp_η disp_Monad_data_from_hss (`T c)
 · disp_μ disp_Monad_data_from_hss c = identity (`T c))
× (∏ c : C,
   # (`T) (disp_η disp_Monad_data_from_hss c)
   · disp_μ disp_Monad_data_from_hss c =
   identity (`T c))
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
∏ c : C,
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (`(pr1 T) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (`(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c = identity (`(pr1 T) c)
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
∏ c : C,
# (`(pr1 T))
  (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c = 
identity (`(pr1 T) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
∏ c : C,
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (`(pr1 T) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (`(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c = identity (`(pr1 T) c)
 apply Monad_law_1_from_hss.
    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
∏ c : C,
# (`(pr1 T))
  (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)
· μ_2 c = identity (`(pr1 T) c)
 apply Monad_law_2_from_hss.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
∏ c : C,
# (`T) (disp_μ disp_Monad_data_from_hss c)
· disp_μ disp_Monad_data_from_hss c =
disp_μ disp_Monad_data_from_hss (`T c)
· disp_μ disp_Monad_data_from_hss c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
∏ c : C,
# (`(pr1 T)) (μ_2 c) · μ_2 c =
μ_2 (`(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
# (`(pr1 T)) (μ_2 c) · μ_2 c =
μ_2 (`(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
# (`(pr1 T)) (μ_2 c) · μ_2 c = pr1 μ_3 c
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
pr1 μ_3 c = μ_2 (`(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
# (`(pr1 T)) (μ_2 c) · μ_2 c = pr1 μ_3 c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H1:= μ_3_T_μ_2_μ_2: μ_3 =
(`T ∘ μ_2
 :
 [C, C] ⟦ (`T ∙ `T) ∙ `T : [C, C, C],
 `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C] ⟧) · μ_2
# (`(pr1 T)) (μ_2 c) · μ_2 c = pr1 μ_3 c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H1:= μ_3_T_μ_2_μ_2: μ_3 =
(`T ∘ μ_2
 :
 [C, C] ⟦ (`T ∙ `T) ∙ `T : [C, C, C],
 `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C] ⟧) · μ_2
H2:= nat_trans_eq_weq C μ_3
  ((`T ∘ μ_2
    :
    [C, C] ⟦ (`T ∙ `T) ∙ `T : [C, C, C],
    `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C] ⟧) · μ_2) H1: ∏ c : C,
μ_3 c =
((`T ∘ μ_2
  :
  [C, C] ⟦ (`T ∙ `T) ∙ `T : [C, C, C],
  `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C] ⟧) · μ_2) c
# (`(pr1 T)) (μ_2 c) · μ_2 c = pr1 μ_3 c

      apply pathsinv0, H2.
    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
pr1 μ_3 c = μ_2 (`(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H1:= μ_3_μ_2_T_μ_2: (μ_2 •• `T · μ_2
 :
 [C, C] ⟦ functor_compose (`T ∙ `T) `T : [C, C],
 `T ⟧) = μ_3
pr1 μ_3 c = μ_2 (`(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T: hss CP H
c: C
H1:= μ_3_μ_2_T_μ_2: (μ_2 •• `T · μ_2
 :
 [C, C] ⟦ functor_compose (`T ∙ `T) `T : [C, C],
 `T ⟧) = μ_3
H2:= nat_trans_eq_weq C (μ_2 •• `T · μ_2) μ_3 H1: ∏ c : C, (μ_2 •• `T · μ_2) c = μ_3 c
pr1 μ_3 c = μ_2 (`(pr1 T) c) · μ_2 c

      apply pathsinv0, H2.
Qed.

Definition Monad_from_hss : Monad C := _ ,, _ ,, disp_Monad_laws_from_hss.

End mu_from_fbracket.

(** ** A functor from hss to monads *)

(** Objects are considered above, now morphisms *)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β: hssMor T T'
Monad_Mor_laws (pr1 (pr1 β))


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β: hssMor T T'
Monad_Mor_laws (pr1 (pr1 β))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β: hssMor T T'
∏ a : C,
μ (Monad_from_hss T) a · pr1 (pr1 β) a =
pr1 (pr1 β) (`(pr1 T) a)
· # (`(pr1 T')) (pr1 (pr1 β) a)
· μ (Monad_from_hss T') a
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β: hssMor T T'
∏ a : C,
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) a
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) a · pr1 (pr1 β) a =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T')) a
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T') a

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β: hssMor T T'
∏ a : C,
μ (Monad_from_hss T) a · pr1 (pr1 β) a =
pr1 (pr1 β) (`(pr1 T) a)
· # (`(pr1 T')) (pr1 (pr1 β) a)
· μ (Monad_from_hss T') a
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β: hssMor T T'
c: C
μ (Monad_from_hss T) c · pr1 (pr1 β) c =
pr1 (pr1 β) (`(pr1 T) c)
· # (`(pr1 T')) (pr1 (pr1 β) c)
· μ (Monad_from_hss T') c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β: hssMor T T'
c: C
μ (Monad_from_hss T) c · pr1 (pr1 β) c =
pr1 (pr1 β) (`(pr1 T) c)
· # (`(pr1 T')) (pr1 (pr1 β) c)
· μ (Monad_from_hss T') c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β: hssMor T T'
c: C
μ (Monad_from_hss T) c · pr1 (pr1 β) c =
pr1 (pr1 β) (`(pr1 T) c)
· # (`(pr1 T')) (pr1 (pr1 β) c)
· μ (Monad_from_hss T') c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β: hssMor T T'
c: C
H':= isbracketMor_hssMor C CP H β: isbracketMor C CP H β
μ (Monad_from_hss T) c · pr1 (pr1 β) c =
pr1 (pr1 β) (`(pr1 T) c)
· # (`(pr1 T')) (pr1 (pr1 β) c)
· μ (Monad_from_hss T') c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β: hssMor T T'
c: C
H':= isbracketMor_hssMor C CP H β: ∏ (Z : Ptd) (f : Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧),
fbracket T f · β =
β •• U Z
· fbracket T'
    (f · # (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β)
μ (Monad_from_hss T) c · pr1 (pr1 β) c =
pr1 (pr1 β) (`(pr1 T) c)
· # (`(pr1 T')) (pr1 (pr1 β) c)
· μ (Monad_from_hss T') c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β: hssMor T T'
c: C
H':= isbracketMor_hssMor C CP H β: ∏ (Z : Ptd) (f : Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧),
fbracket T f · β =
β •• U Z
· fbracket T'
    (f · # (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β)
H2:= H' (ptd_from_alg T) (identity (ptd_from_alg T)): fbracket T (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) · β =
β •• U (ptd_from_alg T)
· fbracket T'
    (identity (ptd_from_alg T)
     · # (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β)
μ (Monad_from_hss T) c · pr1 (pr1 β) c =
pr1 (pr1 β) (`(pr1 T) c)
· # (`(pr1 T')) (pr1 (pr1 β) c)
· μ (Monad_from_hss T') c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β: hssMor T T'
c: C
H':= isbracketMor_hssMor C CP H β: ∏ (Z : Ptd) (f : Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧),
fbracket T f · β =
β •• U Z
· fbracket T'
    (f · # (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β)
H2:= H' (ptd_from_alg T) (identity (ptd_from_alg T)): fbracket T (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) · β =
β •• U (ptd_from_alg T)
· fbracket T'
    (identity (ptd_from_alg T)
     · # (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β)
H3:= nat_trans_eq_weq C
  (fbracket T (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) · β)
  (β •• U (ptd_from_alg T)
   · fbracket T'
       (identity (ptd_from_alg T)
        · # (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β)) H2: ∏ c : C,
(fbracket T (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) · β) c =
(β •• U (ptd_from_alg T)
 · fbracket T'
     (identity (ptd_from_alg T)
      · # (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β)) c
μ (Monad_from_hss T) c · pr1 (pr1 β) c =
pr1 (pr1 β) (`(pr1 T) c)
· # (`(pr1 T')) (pr1 (pr1 β) c)
· μ (Monad_from_hss T') c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β: hssMor T T'
c: C
H':= isbracketMor_hssMor C CP H β: ∏ (Z : Ptd) (f : Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧),
fbracket T f · β =
β •• U Z
· fbracket T'
    (f · # (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β)
H2:= H' (ptd_from_alg T) (identity (ptd_from_alg T)): fbracket T (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) · β =
β •• U (ptd_from_alg T)
· fbracket T'
    (identity (ptd_from_alg T)
     · # (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β)
H3: ∏ c : C,
(fbracket T (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) · β) c =
(β •• U (ptd_from_alg T)
 · fbracket T' (# (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β))
  c
μ (Monad_from_hss T) c · pr1 (pr1 β) c =
pr1 (pr1 β) (`(pr1 T) c)
· # (`(pr1 T')) (pr1 (pr1 β) c)
· μ (Monad_from_hss T') c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β: hssMor T T'
c: C
H':= isbracketMor_hssMor C CP H β: ∏ (Z : Ptd) (f : Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧),
fbracket T f · β =
β •• U Z
· fbracket T'
    (f · # (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β)
H2:= H' (ptd_from_alg T) (identity (ptd_from_alg T)): fbracket T (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) · β =
β •• U (ptd_from_alg T)
· fbracket T'
    (identity (ptd_from_alg T)
     · # (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β)
H3: ∏ c : C,
fbracket T (identity (ptd_from_alg (pr1 T))) c
· β c =
pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· fbracket T' (ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β) c
μ (Monad_from_hss T) c · pr1 (pr1 β) c =
pr1 (pr1 β) (`(pr1 T) c)
· # (`(pr1 T')) (pr1 (pr1 β) c)
· μ (Monad_from_hss T') c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β: hssMor T T'
c: C
pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· fbracket T' (ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β) c =
pr1 (pr1 β) (`(pr1 T) c)
· # (`(pr1 T')) (pr1 (pr1 β) c)
· μ (Monad_from_hss T') c

c: C
pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 T)) c)
· (`T' ∘ # U (ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β)
   · fbracket T' (identity (ptd_from_alg T'))) c =
pr1 (pr1 β) (`(pr1 T) c)
· # (`(pr1 T')) (pr1 (pr1 β) c)
· μ (Monad_from_hss T') c

· (`T' ∘ # U (ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β)
   · fbracket T' (identity (ptd_from_alg T'))) c =

· (# (`(pr1 T')) (pr1 (pr1 β) c)

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))

β: hssMor T T'
c: C

 · fbracket T' (identity (ptd_from_alg T'))) c =

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β: hssMor T T'
c: C
(`T' ∘ # U (ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β)) c =
# (`(pr1 T')) (pr1 (pr1 β) c)

    apply idpath.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β: hssMor T T'
∏ a : C,
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) a
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) a
· pr1 (pr1 β) a =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T')) a
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') a
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β: hssMor T T'
∏ a : C,
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) a
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) a
· pr1 (pr1 β) a =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T')) a
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') a

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β: hssMor T T'
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
· pr1 (pr1 β) c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T')) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β: hssMor T T'
c: C
H':= ptd_mor_commutes C (ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β): ∏ c : C,
ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg T) c
· ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β c =
ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg T') c
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c
· pr1 (pr1 β) c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T')) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c

    apply H'.
Qed.

Definition Monad_Mor_from_hssMor {T T' : hss CP H}(β : hssMor T T')
  : Monad_Mor (Monad_from_hss T) (Monad_from_hss T')
  := tpair _ _ (Monad_Mor_laws_from_hssMor T T' β).



C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
functor_data (hss_precategory CP H) (category_Monad C)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
functor_data (hss_precategory CP H) (category_Monad C)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
∏ a b : hss_precategory CP H,
hss_precategory CP H ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ category_Monad C ⟦ Monad_from_hss a,
  Monad_from_hss b ⟧

  exact @Monad_Mor_from_hssMor.
Defined.

θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
is_functor hss_to_monad_functor_data

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
a: hss_precategory_data C CP H
# hss_to_monad_functor_data (identity a) =
identity (hss_to_monad_functor_data a)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
a: hss_precategory_data C CP H
pr1 (# hss_to_monad_functor_data (identity a)) =
pr1 (identity (hss_to_monad_functor_data a))

    apply idpath.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
functor_compax hss_to_monad_functor_data
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
a, b, c: hss_precategory_data C CP H
f: hss_precategory_data C CP H ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: hss_precategory_data C CP H ⟦ b, c ⟧
# hss_to_monad_functor_data (f · g) =
# hss_to_monad_functor_data f
· # hss_to_monad_functor_data g

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
a, b, c: hss_precategory_data C CP H
f: hss_precategory_data C CP H ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: hss_precategory_data C CP H ⟦ b, c ⟧
pr1 (# hss_to_monad_functor_data (f · g)) =
pr1
  (# hss_to_monad_functor_data f
   · # hss_to_monad_functor_data g)

    apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition hss_to_monad_functor : functor _ _ := tpair _ _ is_functor_hss_to_monad.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β, β': hssMor T T'
β = β'
≃ Monad_Mor_from_hssMor β = Monad_Mor_from_hssMor β'


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β, β': hssMor T T'
β = β'
≃ Monad_Mor_from_hssMor β = Monad_Mor_from_hssMor β'

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β, β': hssMor T T'
β = β' ≃ ?Y
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β, β': hssMor T T'
?Y
≃ Monad_Mor_from_hssMor β = Monad_Mor_from_hssMor β'

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β, β': hssMor T T'
β = β' ≃ ?Y
 apply hssMor_eq.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β, β': hssMor T T'
β = β'
≃ Monad_Mor_from_hssMor β = Monad_Mor_from_hssMor β'
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss CP H
β, β': hssMor T T'
Monad_Mor_from_hssMor β = Monad_Mor_from_hssMor β'
≃ β = β'

    use Monad_Mor_equiv.
Defined.

(** *** The functor from hss to monads is faithful, i.e. forgets at most structure *)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
faithful hss_to_monad_functor


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
faithful hss_to_monad_functor

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
∏ a b : hss_precategory CP H,
isincl
  (λ f : hss_precategory CP H ⟦ a, b ⟧,
   # hss_to_monad_functor f)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss_precategory CP H
isincl
  (λ f : hss_precategory CP H ⟦ T, T' ⟧,
   # hss_to_monad_functor f)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss_precategory CP H
isaset (hss_precategory CP H ⟦ T, T' ⟧)
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss_precategory CP H
isaset
  (category_Monad C ⟦ hss_to_monad_functor T,
   hss_to_monad_functor T' ⟧)
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss_precategory CP H
∏ x x' : hss_precategory CP H ⟦ T, T' ⟧,
# hss_to_monad_functor x = # hss_to_monad_functor x'
→ x = x'

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss_precategory CP H
isaset (hss_precategory CP H ⟦ T, T' ⟧)
 apply isaset_hssMor.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss_precategory CP H
isaset
  (category_Monad C ⟦ hss_to_monad_functor T,
   hss_to_monad_functor T' ⟧)
 apply isaset_Monad_Mor.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss_precategory CP H
∏ x x' : hss_precategory CP H ⟦ T, T' ⟧,
# hss_to_monad_functor x = # hss_to_monad_functor x'
→ x = x'
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
θ_strength1_int:= Sig_strength_law1 H: θ_Strength1_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
θ_strength2_int:= Sig_strength_law2 H: θ_Strength2_int (pr1 (pr2 H))
T, T': hss_precategory CP H
β, β': hss_precategory CP H ⟦ T, T' ⟧
# hss_to_monad_functor β = # hss_to_monad_functor β'
→ β = β'

    apply (invmap (hssMor_Monad_Mor_eq _ _ )).
Qed.



End monad_from_hss.
